positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic mountain lion (cougar) walking through a stylized forest landscape. The design should feature a strong, negative-space silhouette of the cougar with geometric accents and sparse floral elements (eucalyptus and ferns). The style should be a modern, flat vector illustration with a strong line art aesthetic, resembling botanical and wildlife poster art. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep burnt orange, forest green, charcoal gray, and creamy off-white. The composition should be centered, emphasizing the clean lines and graphic impact, suitable for a single-color screen print on apparel. Clean edges, high contrast, crisp lines, nature motifs, wilderness art.
